checklist.entry: Use Batch API for asynchronous workloads that do not require immediate responses.
Prepare JSONL input with unique custom_id values so results can be matched back to source records.
Record completion window, status handling, error file handling and retry rules.
Do not use Batch API for interactive user journeys that require immediate response.
Use webhooks only with signature verification, replay protection and idempotent processing.
Do not trust webhook payloads until verification succeeds.
Record retry, duplicate-event and dead-letter behaviour.
Use Realtime API for low-latency multimodal or speech interaction needs.
Separate browser, server and ephemeral-token responsibilities.
Record consent, recording, transcription, accessibility and safeguarding implications for voice or audio use.
